html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

Ice CrystaleyezerDeactivated Ice CrystaleyezerIce Crystaleyezer Kit

The Ice Crystaleyezer is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. The Ice Crystaleyezer Kit can only be crafted while next to the Brightsmithy, and placed to build the Ice Crystaleyezer. It requires 1 Spark Ark, 8 Moon Shards, 5 Pure Brilliance, and 3 Moon Rocks to craft.

The Crystaleyezer is inactive when first built. To activate it, the player must insert a Deerclops Eyeball into it. The Eyeball can be removed at any time to deactivate the Crystaleyezer's effects.

When activated, the Crystaleyezer has a small aura of ice (similar to the one made by Crystal Deerclops) next to it that deals freezing damage to players stepping within. This means that activating or deactivating it will usually cause some damage. Additionally, while next to the Crystaleyezer, players and creatures gain freeze stacks, which makes them more vulnerable to freezing attacks such as the Ice Staff.

The activated Ice Crystaleyezer emits an aura of cold temperature in a radius of 8.75 tiles (35 wall units), making the ambient temperature -10 degrees, which:

  • Prevents Wildfires
  • Counters Overheating but causes Freezing instead
  • Causes Farm Soil to not naturally lose Moisture
  • Causes perishable items to spoil 25% slower and Ice to not melt

The activated Crystaleyezer also creates a Mini Glacier every 7–12 days, up to a maximum of 6. This works even in the Caves.

The activated structure is also displayed on the Map prominently and reveals the fog of war around it, much like the Ocuvigil.

The Ice Crystaleyezer Kit and the built structure drop the full Spark Ark when deconstructed with the Deconstruction Staff. The structure drops an empty Spark Ark if destroyed with a hammer.

Trivia

  • The Ice Crystaleyezer was introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
  • On initial beta release, the Ice Crystaleyezer was a structure you could pre-craft. This caused issues due to it being exclusive to the Brightsmithy and not showing up when away from it. The previously unimplemented Ice Crystaleyezer Kit was added in Update 575324.
  • On beta release prior to update 576123, the Ice Crystaleyezer did not drop the Spark Ark at all when deconstructed or hammered.
  • Prior to beta update 576473, the Ice Crystaleyezer had a smaller radius of 6.25 tiles (25 wall units).

Gallery

  • Ice Crystaleyezer idle animation.
  • Ice Crystaleyezer Kit Dropped.
  • Removed Ice Crystaleyezer Crafting Icon.
  • Ice Crystaleyezer Map Icon.
  • Ice Crystaleyezer Map Icon.
  • Ice Crystaleyezer concept art from Rhymes with Play.
  • Ice Crystaleyezer concept art from Rhymes with Play.

Ice CrystaleyezerDeactivated Ice CrystaleyezerIce Crystaleyezer Kit
“How's that for an icy gaze?”
–Wilson, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“But how will anything burn?”
–Willow, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Scary eye put chill in Wolfgang's spine.”
–Wolfgang, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“No colder than a world without Abigail.”
–Wendy, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“ORGANICS HATE THE COLD. PERFECT”
–WX-78, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“An implement that conditions the air, or ambient-temperature-reduction-device for short.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“She'll keep the brews frosty all summer, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Keeps it cold like my heart.”
–Maxwell, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“The cöld döth sööth me.”
–Wigfrid, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Brrr, we don't like it chilly.”
–Webber, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“If you can't take the heat, freeze the kitchen.”
–Warly, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Branch head eye make cold”
–Wormwood, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“That is one creepy refrigeration unit.”
–Winona, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“What the eye sees stays icy! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Hi Eye!”
–Wurt, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“The way it stares at me is so creepy. I love it.”
–Walter, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Feels like we're back in the ice age.”
–Wanda, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer holding a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Someone lose an eye?”
–Wilson, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“There we go.”
–Willow, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Okay, scary eye gone but now is too hot for Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Hot. Cold. What does it matter?”
–Wendy, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“MAKE IT COLD AGAIN”
–WX-78, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“It is rendered useless without the eye of that beast.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“The eye's been lifted? Where are we? Toronto?”
–Woodie, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Don't say I didn't warn you when it all goes up in flames.”
–Maxwell, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Where art thöu, cursed eye?”
–Wigfrid, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Aww, we have eight eyes and it doesn't even have one.”
–Webber, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“It's missing the SEEcret ingredient.”
–Warly, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Where branch head eye?”
–Wormwood, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“It needs that spooky ol' eye to work.”
–Winona, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“It turned a blind eye!”
–Wortox, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Glorp! Who take shiny eyeball?”
–Wurt, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Something is missing. Woby, that eyeball is not a toy!”
–Walter, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“The part that makes it work is missing. Typical.”
–Wanda, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer lacking a Deerclops Eyeball.
“Stand back everyone, I am a trained scientist!”
–Wilson, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“Fine, I'll build it. But I might burn it later.”
–Willow, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“Is not ready! Wolfgang will fix this.”
–Wolfgang, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“I guess I could set this up and be helpful.”
–Wendy, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“ASSEMBLY REQUIRED”
–WX-78, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“It should be a simple matter to construct it.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“Better get buildin', eh?”
–Woodie, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“Do I have to do everything around here?”
–Maxwell, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“Fear nöt the heat, I shall build this pösthaste.”
–Wigfrid, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“We have many eyes and arms to build this!”
–Webber, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“I'll whip it up tout de suite!”
–Warly, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“Not done yet.”
–Wormwood, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“Time to roll up the ol' sleeves!”
–Winona, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“I'll keep my eye on the prize, hyuyu!”
–Wortox, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“Looks easy to build, flort.”
–Wurt, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“Woby, wanna help me put this together?”
–Walter, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.
“I think I already built this later.”
–Wanda, when examining an Ice Crystaleyezer Kit.

The '''Ice Crystaleyezer''' is a craftable [[Structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. The '''Ice Crystaleyezer Kit''' can only be crafted while next to the [[Brightsmithy]], and placed to build the Ice Crystaleyezer. It requires 1 [[Spark Ark]], 8 [[Moon Shard]]s, 5 [[Pure Brilliance]], and 3 [[Moon Rock]]s to craft.

The Crystaleyezer is inactive when first built. To activate it, the player must insert a [[Deerclops Eyeball]] into it. The Eyeball can be removed at any time to deactivate the Crystaleyezer's effects.

When activated, the Crystaleyezer has a small aura of ice (similar to the one made by [[Crystal Deerclops]]) next to it that deals freezing damage to players stepping within. This means that activating or deactivating it will usually cause some damage. Additionally, while next to the Crystaleyezer, players and creatures gain freeze stacks, which makes them more vulnerable to freezing attacks such as the [[Ice Staff]].

The activated Ice Crystaleyezer emits an aura of cold temperature in a radius of 8.75 tiles (35 wall units), making the ambient temperature -10 degrees, which:
*Prevents [[Wildfires]]
*Counters [[Overheating]] but causes [[Freezing]] instead
*Causes [[Farm Soil]] to not naturally lose [[Farm Plant#Ground Moisture|Moisture]]
*Causes perishable items to spoil 25% slower and [[Ice]] to not melt
The activated Crystaleyezer also creates a [[Mini Glacier]] every 7–12 days, up to a maximum of 6. This works even in the [[Caves]].

The activated structure is also displayed on the Map prominently and reveals the fog of war around it, much like the [[Ocuvigil]].

The Ice Crystaleyezer Kit and the built structure drop the full Spark Ark when deconstructed with the [[Deconstruction Staff]]. The structure drops an empty Spark Ark if destroyed with a hammer.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
*The Ice Crystaleyezer was introduced in the ''[[Host of Horrors]]'' update.
*On initial beta release, the Ice Crystaleyezer was a structure you could pre-craft. This caused issues due to it being exclusive to the Brightsmithy and not showing up when away from it. The previously unimplemented Ice Crystaleyezer Kit was added in Update 575324.
*On beta release prior to update 576123, the Ice Crystaleyezer did not drop the Spark Ark at all when deconstructed or hammered.
*Prior to beta update 576473, the Ice Crystaleyezer had a smaller radius of 6.25 tiles (25 wall units).
